VAL-FONT-001.evidence: Pixel inspection of QEMU screenshot shows R!=G!=B at glyph edges for both fonts. Title bar (Nunito Sans): 516 subpixel pixels detected (e.g. (39,10): R=122 G=151 B=189). Editor text (Source Code Pro): 369 subpixel pixels detected (e.g. (15,66): R=130 G=148 B=169). Unit tests: subpixel_coverage_has_3_channels, subpixel_rgb_channels_differ_at_edges, subpixel_monospace_cache_has_3_channel_coverage, subpixel_proportional_cache_has_3_channel_coverage — all pass.
VAL-FONT-001.details: Both font caches produce 3-channel RGB subpixel coverage. Glyph edges have distinct R, G, B values confirming per-channel LCD antialiasing, not greyscale.

VAL-FONT-002.evidence: Code review: STEM_DARKENING_LUT in drawing/lib.rs applies formula darkened = cov + 70*(255-cov)/255. LUT applied in truetype.rs:891 after rasterization via STEM_DARKENING_LUT[coverage]. Unit tests: stem_darkening_lut_boost_mid_range, stem_darkening_lut_full_stays_full, stem_darkening_lut_zero_stays_zero, stem_darkening_lut_monotonic, stem_darkening_applied_to_rasterized_glyph, stem_darkening_all_three_channels_equally, stem_darkening_boost_is_tunable — all 7 pass. LUT[c] > c for all c in 1..254 confirmed by tests.
VAL-FONT-002.details: STEM_DARKENING_BOOST=70 provides non-linear coverage boost. Zero stays zero, full stays full, all mid-range values are strictly boosted. Applied equally to all 3 subpixel channels.

VAL-FONT-003.evidence: Code review: FONT_SIZE constant is 20 in compositor/main.rs:36. Screenshot confirms visibly larger text than 16px baseline. Both mono_cache and prop_cache use FONT_SIZE (20px) for populate().
VAL-FONT-003.details: FONT_SIZE = 20 (within required 18-20px range). Text is clearly readable and larger than previous 16px.

VAL-FONT-004.evidence: Code review: drawing/lib.rs:311-327 computes ascent/descent from font.hhea_ascent()/hhea_descent() (font units scaled to pixels). baseline_offset = cache.ascent used at lib.rs:1016 and 1159. No hardcoded 3/4 heuristic in active code. Unit tests: hhea_ascent_descent_parsed_source_code_pro, hhea_ascent_descent_parsed_nunito_sans, glyph_cache_stores_ascent_descent, glyph_cache_ascent_equals_baseline_for_source_code_pro, baseline_uses_ascent_not_heuristic — all pass. Screenshot: typed 'gypq' and descenders are fully rendered with 139 non-background pixels in descender zone (y=75-90).
VAL-FONT-004.details: Baseline positioning uses hhea metrics. Descenders of g, y, p, q are fully visible without clipping.

VAL-FONT-005.evidence: Code review: truetype.rs:928-933 implements kern_advance() using GPOS PairPos lookups. drawing/lib.rs:1493-1531 applies kerning in draw_proportional_string_kerned(). Unit tests: gpos_kern_table_parsed_nunito_sans, gpos_kern_av_pair, gpos_kern_we_pair, gpos_kern_no_adjustment_for_unrelated_pair, gpos_kern_source_code_pro_has_no_gpos, kerned_proportional_string_is_narrower — all 6 pass. Screenshot: title bar 'Untitled' rendered in Nunito Sans with natural proportional spacing. Clock digits show varying widths (3px for colons, 9-11px for digits) confirming proportional rendering.
VAL-FONT-005.details: GPOS kerning parsed and applied for Nunito Sans. Proportional text has natural character spacing with tighter pairs.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Subpixel rendering active for both fonts (516+369 subpixel pixels). Stem darkening LUT with boost=70 confirmed. Font size is 20px. hhea baseline metrics used with descenders fully rendered. GPOS kerning applied for proportional font. 887 total tests pass.
